title: Anthropic Releases Claude Opus 4.8 with Enhanced Multimodal Reasoning 4
summary: Anthropic has launched Claude Opus 4.8, featuring significant improvements in multimodal reasoning, code generation, and long-context understanding. The model demonstrates state-of-the-art performance on complex scientific and mathematical tasks while maintaining the safety standards Anthropic is known for.
shareText: Anthropic just released Claude Opus 4.8 with major multimodal reasoning upgrades — state-of-the-art on complex science and math tasks. 🧠 #AI #Claude #Anthropic
xPost: Anthropic just released Claude Opus 4.8 with major multimodal reasoning upgrades — state-of-the-art on complex science and math tasks. 🧠 #AI #Claude
